summary: Admin PRC Subscription and Redeem Features - VERIFIED. Both backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly. All 15 backend tests pass. Frontend shows Admin Actions section with Activate PRC Subscription and Redeem to Bank features.

backend_admin_activate_prc_subscription.description: Admin can activate elite subscription for user using PRC. Bypasses cooldown. Respects PRC balance check.

backend_admin_create_redeem_request.description: Admin can create bank redeem request for user. Respects available redeem limit and PRC balance.

tests_passed: Search by UID returns user data with redeem_limit
Search by mobile returns user data
backend_user360_integration.description: User360 API returns complete user data including redeem limit info

backend_elite_pricing.description: Elite subscription pricing calculation working correctly

verified_elements: Activate PRC Subscription section with 'Activate Elite (PRC)' button
Redeem to Bank section with Available Limit display
frontend_user360_admin_actions.description: All UI elements for admin PRC subscription and redeem features present and accessible

critical_code_review_comments: admin_misc.py Lines 923-1095: admin_activate_prc_subscription endpoint correctly validates admin role, checks PRC balance, deducts PRC, updates subscription, creates transaction entry
admin_misc.py Lines 1101-1228: admin_create_redeem_request endpoint correctly validates admin role, checks redeem limit, validates bank details, deducts PRC, creates redeem_requests entry
AdminUser360New.js Lines 958-1035: Admin Actions section properly displays Activate PRC Subscription and Redeem to Bank with all required inputs and buttons
All data-testid attributes present for testing: admin-activate-sub-btn, admin-create-redeem-btn, admin-redeem-amount, admin-redeem-account, admin-redeem-ifsc
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin PRC Subscription and Redeem features fully tested. Test User DMT (9421331342) has ~56000 PRC but 0 effective_available redeem limit (network_size=0). The redeem limit is based on growth network size. Elite subscription costs ~16477 PRC. Both APIs require admin role (admin/super_admin/manager). Frontend Admin Actions section in User360 page shows both features with proper data-testid attributes.
